item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch! If you’d like to talk about my work, a role, a project, or just say hello, you can reach me through any of the channels below.

item.title: About
item.description: I am building a technical portfolio focused on practical work across cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and Microsoft 365 administration.

item.title: Linux Admin Checks and Reference
item.description: Linux Admin Checks and Reference Summary This note is a quick reference for the kinds of checks that often support Linux administration and troubleshooting.

item.title: index
item.description: Linux Reference Summary This section is for quick Linux reference notes that support admin work, troubleshooting, and daily terminal use.

item.title: Filesystem, Paths, and FHS
item.description: Filesystem, Paths, and FHS Summary This note explains how to think about the Linux filesystem, paths, and the basic idea of the filesystem hierarchy standard.

item.title: Permissions, Ownership, and sudo
item.description: Permissions, Ownership, and sudo Summary This note explains how permissions, file ownership, and sudo fit together in Linux.

item.title: Processes, Services, and systemd
item.description: Processes, Services, and systemd Summary This note explains how to think about running processes, background services, and the role of systemd in Linux systems.

item.title: index
item.description: Linux Concepts Summary This section is for the core ideas behind Linux administration and troubleshooting.

item.title: Command management
item.description: Command Management Summary This note is a quick reference for command history and command reuse in the shell.

item.title: Container Commands
item.description: Container Commands Summary This note is a quick reference for the container-related command layer used around Fedora Atomic.
